description: Anatoly Yakovenko discusses the intersection of wireless networks and blockchain technology, emphasizing the challenges of billing complexity and the potential for blockchain to revolutionize financial services. He highlights the need for efficient infrastructure to support millions of users and the transformative impact of decentralized systems on the economy.
topic_summary: Exploration of 5G networks and blockchain integration, addressing billing issues and the potential for efficiency in financial services [t=55:80].
